description: ADR-598 G2 — pnpm audit CVE allowlist. Every HIGH/CRITICAL advisory pnpm reports must appear here (keyed by GHSA id). A HIGH/CRITICAL advisory outside this list blocks the PR. Ratchet: to accept a new advisory add it here with a reason/owner; to lock progress after a fix, prune the stale entry and refresh via `pnpm run deps-audit:baseline`.
